title: Tickeron Introduces AI Agents for Core and Leveraged ETFs with 75% Win Rate
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
# Next-Generation AI Trading Agents for ETFs

[Tickeron](https://tickeron.com/), a leader in AI-powered financial analytics, has announced the launch of a new suite of [AI Trading Agents](https://tickeron.com/app/ai-crypto-robots/signals/all/) designed specifically for **Core and Leveraged ETFs**. Leveraged ETFs use derivatives to magnify daily index movements—often providing 2× or 3× exposure—making them attractive for short-term trading in volatile sectors such as technology and semiconductors. Core ETFs, by contrast, track major market indexes and serve as low-cost building blocks for long-term portfolios.  
Tickeron’s new AI Agents bring automation and discipline to both approaches, delivering high win rates and data-driven execution.

https://preview.redd.it/cqcek1v1jyag1.png?width=712&format=png&auto=webp&s=13daa01835db3a75f900172ad450196ab8de114a

# Key Takeaways

* Tickeron’s newly released AI Agents deliver a **75% win rate** across Core and Leveraged ETF strategies, with **annualized returns exceeding 100%** in select cases.
* Top performers include **SOXL**, which generated a **117% annualized return** and **$90,554 in closed trades P/L** over 302 days.
* Upgraded **Financial Learning Models (FLMs)** enable faster reactions to market shifts and support new **15-minute and 5-minute Agents** for real-time trading.
* A **New Year Sale** offers up to **75% off** AI Robots, signals, and tools, with plans starting at **$5 per month**.
* The launch aligns with the strong **2025 bull market**, where the S&P 500 rose 17% amid AI-driven earnings growth and Federal Reserve rate cuts.

# Strong Performance Across Leveraged and Core ETFs

Powered by a consistent 75% win rate, Tickeron’s ETF-focused AI Agents have produced standout results across multiple strategies and timeframes. Highlights include:

* **SOXL (5-min):** \+117% annualized return, $90,554 P/L
* **DLLL (15-min):** \+105% annualized return, $88,097 P/L
* **TECL (15-min):** \+104% annualized return, $35,498 P/L
* **DFEN (60-min):** \+104% annualized return, $26,644 P/L
* **AMDG (60-min):** \+84% annualized return, $22,431 P/L
* **USD (15-min):** \+83% annualized return, $41,452 P/L
* **GOOX (15-min):** \+83% annualized return, $20,705 P/L

Collectively, these strategies completed more than **1,200 closed trades**, demonstrating consistent profitability across leveraged and sector-focused ETFs.

# Faster Learning, Smarter Execution

To support these results, Tickeron has expanded its computing infrastructure, allowing Financial Learning Models to process market data more quickly and adapt to volatility with greater precision. These improvements enable the rollout of **15-minute and 5-minute AI Agents**, offering faster execution and more responsive trade management.  
Tickeron’s AI Trading Robots deliver real-time pattern recognition, transparent decision logic, and disciplined automation—making them suitable for both beginner traders and experienced professionals.Explore all AI Trading Bots at [AI Trading for Stock Market | Tickeron](https://tickeron.com/app/ai-robots/virtualagents/x2-x3-long-etfs/).

# The CEO’s Vision for AI-Driven Trading

Sergey Savastiouk, Ph.D., CEO of [Tickeron](https://tickeron.com/), highlights the importance of combining AI with technical analysis to manage market volatility effectively. By integrating Financial Learning Models with proven technical frameworks, Tickeron helps traders identify patterns more accurately and act with confidence. From beginner-friendly bots to advanced ETF strategies, Tickeron’s AI solutions provide real-time insights and greater control in fast-moving markets.
